title: DocumentTemplate
description: A PDF Monkey document template defining the HTML/Liquid body, SCSS styles, sample data, and generation settings used to produce PDF documents.

app_id.description: Workspace (app) identifier this template belongs to

identifier.description: Human-readable unique identifier for the template within the workspace

edition_mode.description: Whether this template was created with the code editor or visual builder

output_type.description: Output format for documents generated from this template

is_draft.description: Whether the template is currently in draft state (unpublished changes pending)

body.description: Published HTML + Liquid template body content

body_draft.description: Draft HTML + Liquid template body (not yet published)

scss_style.description: Published CSS/SCSS stylesheet for the template

sample_data.description: Published JSON sample data used for template preview and testing

sample_data_draft.description: Draft JSON sample data (not yet published)

settings_draft.description: Draft PDF generation settings (not yet published)

pdf_engine_id.description: UUID of the PDF rendering engine to use for generation

pdf_engine_draft_id.description: UUID of the draft PDF rendering engine

template_folder_id.description: UUID of the folder this template is organized in

ttl.description: Time-to-live in seconds for documents generated from this template. Null means no expiry.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the template was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last template update

TemplateSettings.description: PDF generation settings controlling layout, dimensions, and rendering behavior

footer.description: Footer configuration with optional left, center, right, or content properties

header.description: Header configuration with optional left, center, right, or content properties

inject_javascript.description: Whether to execute JavaScript during PDF generation

paper_format.description: Standard paper size. Use 'custom' with paper_height and paper_width.

paper_height.description: Custom paper height in millimeters (only used when paper_format is 'custom')

paper_width.description: Custom paper width in millimeters (only used when paper_format is 'custom')

transparent_background.description: Whether the PDF background should be transparent

use_emojis.description: Whether to enable emoji rendering in the generated PDF

use_paged.description: Whether to use Paged.js for print/page layout processing
